widgets.name: CupertinoActivityIndicator
widgets.description: An iOS-style activity indicator that spins clockwise.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Color of the activity indicator.

properties.name: animating
properties.description: Whether the activity indicator is running its animation.

properties.name: radius
properties.description: Radius of the spinner widget.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The amount of space to surround the child inside the bounds of the button.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of the button's background.

properties.name: onPressed
properties.description: The callback that is called when the button is tapped or otherwise activated.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Whether the button is disabled.

properties.name: child
properties.description: The widget below this widget in the tree.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The amount of space to surround the child inside the bounds of the button.

properties.name: color
properties.description: The color of the button's background.

properties.name: onPressed
properties.description: The callback that is called when the button is tapped or otherwise activated.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Whether the button is disabled.

properties.name: children
properties.description: The list of rows in the section. Usually a list of [CupertinoListTile]s.

properties.name: header
properties.description: Sets the form section header. The section header lies above the [children] rows. Usually a [Text] widget.

properties.name: footer
properties.description: Sets the form section footer. The section footer lies below the [children] rows. Usually a [Text] widget.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

properties.name: children
properties.description: The list of rows in the section. Usually a list of [CupertinoListTile]s.

properties.name: header
properties.description: Sets the form section header. The section header lies above the [children] rows. Usually a [Text] widget.

properties.name: footer
properties.description: Sets the form section footer. The section footer lies below the [children] rows. Usually a [Text] widget.

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

properties.name: title
properties.description: A [title] is used to convey the central information. Usually a [Text].

properties.name: subtitle
properties.description: A [subtitle] is used to display additional information. It is located below [title]. Usually a [Text] widget.

properties.name: leading
properties.description: A widget displayed at the start of the [CupertinoListTile]. This is typically an `Icon` or an `Image`.

properties.name: trailing
properties.description: A widget displayed at the end of the [CupertinoListTile]. This is usually a right chevron icon (e.g. `CupertinoListTileChevron`), or an `Icon`.

properties.name: onTap
properties.description: The [onTap] function is called when a user taps on [CupertinoListTile]. If left `null`, the [CupertinoListTile] will not react on taps. If this is a `Future<void> Function()`, then the [CupertinoListTile] remains activated until the returned future is awaited. This is according to iOS behavior. However, if this function is a `void Function()`, then the tile is active only for the duration of invocation.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: The [backgroundColor] of the tile in normal state. Once the tile is tapped, the background color switches to [backgroundColorActivated]. It is set to match the iOS look by default.

properties.name: leading
properties.description: {@template flutter.cupertino.CupertinoNavigationBar.leading} Widget to place at the start of the navigation bar. Normally a back button for a normal page or a cancel button for full page dialogs.

properties.name: middle
properties.description: The navigation bar's default title.

properties.name: trailing
properties.description: {@template flutter.cupertino.CupertinoNavigationBar.trailing} Widget to place at the end of the navigation bar. Normally additional actions taken on the page such as a search or edit function. {@endtemplate}

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: {@template flutter.cupertino.CupertinoNavigationBar.backgroundColor} The background color of the navigation bar. If it contains transparency, the tab bar will automatically produce a blurring effect to the content behind it. This behavior can be disabled by setting [enableBackgroundFilterBlur] to false.

widgets.name: CupertinoPageScaffold
widgets.description: Implements a single iOS application page's layout.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: The color of the widget that underlies the entire scaffold.

properties.name: child
properties.description: Widget to show in the main content area.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Whether this switch is on or off.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Called when the user toggles the switch on or off.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: A lighter colored placeholder hint that appears on the first line of the text field when the text entry is empty.

properties.name: obscureText
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.obscureText}

properties.name: maxLines
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.maxLines} * [expands], which determines whether the field should fill the height of its parent.

properties.name: maxLength
properties.description: The maximum number of characters (Unicode grapheme clusters) to allow in the text field.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.onChanged}

properties.name: onSubmitted
properties.description: {@macro flutter.widgets.editableText.onSubmitted}

properties.name: clipBehavior
properties.description: {@macro flutter.material.Material.clipBehavior}

properties.name: value
properties.description: The currently selected value for this slider.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Called when the user selects a new value for the slider.

properties.name: min
properties.description: The minimum value the user can select.

properties.name: max
properties.description: The maximum value the user can select.

properties.name: divisions
properties.description: The number of discrete divisions.

properties.name: activeColor
properties.description: The color to use for the portion of the slider that has been selected.

widgets.name: CupertinoDatePicker
widgets.description: A date picker widget in iOS style.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: The mode of the date picker as one of [CupertinoDatePickerMode]. Defaults to [CupertinoDatePickerMode.dateAndTime]. Value cannot change after initial build.

properties.name: onDateTimeChanged
properties.description: Callback called when the selected date and/or time changes. If the new selected [DateTime] is not valid, or is not in the [minimumDate] through [maximumDate] range, this callback will not be called.

properties.name: minimumYear
properties.description: Minimum year that the picker can be scrolled to in [CupertinoDatePickerMode.date] mode. Defaults to 1.

properties.name: maximumYear
properties.description: Maximum year that the picker can be scrolled to in [CupertinoDatePickerMode.date] mode. Null if there's no limit.

properties.name: minuteInterval
properties.description: The granularity of the minutes spinner, if it is shown in the current mode. Must be an integer factor of 60.

properties.name: use24hFormat
properties.description: Whether to use 24 hour format. Defaults to false.

properties.name: dateOrder
properties.description: Determines the order of the columns inside [CupertinoDatePicker] in [CupertinoDatePickerMode.date] and [CupertinoDatePickerMode.monthYear] mode. When using monthYear mode, both [DatePickerDateOrder.dmy] and [DatePickerDateOrder.mdy] will result in the month|year order. Defaults to the locale's default date format/order.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of date picker.

properties.name: showDayOfWeek
properties.description: Whether to show the day of week alongside the day in [CupertinoDatePickerMode.date] mode.

properties.name: showTimeSeparator
properties.description: Whether to show the time separator between hour and minute in the time [CupertinoDatePickerMode.time] and datetime [CupertinoDatePickerMode.dateAndTime] picker modes.

properties.name: itemExtent
properties.description: {@macro flutter.cupertino.picker.itemExtent}

properties.name: changeReportingBehavior
properties.description: The behavior of reporting the selected date.

widgets.name: CupertinoTimerPicker
widgets.description: A countdown timer picker in iOS style.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: The mode of the timer picker.

properties.name: minuteInterval
properties.description: The granularity of the minute spinner. Must be a positive integer factor of 60.

properties.name: secondInterval
properties.description: The granularity of the second spinner. Must be a positive integer factor of 60.

properties.name: alignment
properties.description: Defines how the timer picker should be positioned within its parent.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of timer picker.

properties.name: itemExtent
properties.description: {@macro flutter.cupertino.picker.itemExtent}

properties.name: onTimerDurationChanged
properties.description: Callback called when the timer duration changes.

properties.name: changeReportingBehavior
properties.description: The behavior of reporting the selected duration.

properties.name: diameterRatio
properties.description: Relative ratio between this picker's height and the simulated cylinder's diameter.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Background color behind the children.

properties.name: offAxisFraction
properties.description: {@macro flutter.rendering.RenderListWheelViewport.offAxisFraction}

properties.name: useMagnifier
properties.description: {@macro flutter.rendering.RenderListWheelViewport.useMagnifier}

properties.name: magnification
properties.description: {@macro flutter.rendering.RenderListWheelViewport.magnification}

properties.name: squeeze
properties.description: {@macro flutter.rendering.RenderListWheelViewport.squeeze}

properties.name: changeReportingBehavior
properties.description: The behavior of reporting the selected item index.

properties.name: itemExtent
properties.description: {@template flutter.cupertino.picker.itemExtent} The uniform height of all children.

properties.name: onSelectedItemChanged
properties.description: Called when the selected item changes.

widgets.name: CupertinoSearchTextField
widgets.description: A [CupertinoTextField] that mimics the look and behavior of UIKit's `UISearchTextField`.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Invoked upon user input.

properties.name: onSubmitted
properties.description: Invoked upon keyboard submission.

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: A hint placeholder text that appears when the text entry is empty.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.description: Set the [decoration] property's background color.

properties.name: itemSize
properties.description: Sets the base icon size for the suffix and prefix icons.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Whether this checkbox is checked.

properties.name: tristate
properties.description: If true, the checkbox's [value] can be true, false, or null.

properties.name: onChanged
properties.description: Called when the value of the checkbox should change.

properties.name: activeColor
properties.description: The color to use when this checkbox is checked.

properties.name: checkColor
properties.description: The color to use for the check icon when this checkbox is checked.

properties.name: semanticLabel
properties.description: The semantic label for the checkbox that will be announced by screen readers.

structuredTypes.name: BoxDecoration
structuredTypes.description: An immutable description of how to paint a box.

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to fill in the background of the box.

fields.name: border
fields.description: A border to draw above the background [color], [gradient], or [image].

fields.name: gradient
fields.description: A gradient to use when filling the box.

fields.name: backgroundBlendMode
fields.description: The blend mode applied to the [color] or [gradient] background of the box.

fields.name: shape
fields.description: The shape to fill the background [color], [gradient], and [image] into and to cast as the [boxShadow].

variants.description: Linearly interpolate between two box decorations.

structuredTypes.name: Border
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides: top, right, bottom, left.

fields.name: right
fields.description: The right side of this border.

fields.name: left
fields.description: The left side of this border.

variants.description: A uniform border with all sides the same color and width.
Creates a border whose sides are all the same.
Creates a border with symmetrical vertical and horizontal sides.
Creates a [Border] that represents the addition of the two given [Border]s.

structuredTypes.name: BorderSide
structuredTypes.description: A side of a border of a box.

structuredTypes.name: TextStyle
structuredTypes.description: An immutable style describing how to format and paint text.

fields.name: inherit
fields.description: Whether null values in this [TextStyle] can be replaced with their value in another [TextStyle] using [merge].

fields.name: color
fields.description: The color to use when painting the text.

fields.name: backgroundColor
fields.description: The color to use as the background for the text.

fields.name: fontFamily
fields.description: The name of the font to use when painting the text (e.g., Roboto).

fields.name: fontSize
fields.description: The size of fonts (in logical pixels) to use when painting the text.

fields.name: fontWeight
fields.description: The typeface thickness to use when painting the text (e.g., bold).

fields.name: fontStyle
fields.description: The typeface variant to use when drawing the letters (e.g., italics).

fields.name: letterSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add between each letter. A negative value can be used to bring the letters closer.

fields.name: wordSpacing
fields.description: The amount of space (in logical pixels) to add at each sequence of white-space (i.e. between each word). A negative value can be used to bring the words closer.

fields.name: height
fields.description: The height of this text span, as a multiple of the font size.

fields.name: leadingDistribution
fields.description: How the vertical space added by the [height] multiplier should be distributed over and under the text.

fields.name: foreground
fields.description: The paint drawn as a foreground for the text.

fields.name: background
fields.description: The paint drawn as a background for the text.

fields.name: decoration
fields.description: The decorations to paint near the text (e.g., an underline).

fields.name: decorationColor
fields.description: The color in which to paint the text decorations.

fields.name: decorationStyle
fields.description: The style in which to paint the text decorations (e.g., dashed).

fields.name: decorationThickness
fields.description: The thickness of the decoration stroke as a multiplier of the thickness defined by the font.

fields.name: debugLabel
fields.description: A human-readable description of this text style.

fields.name: shadows
fields.description: A list of [Shadow]s that will be painted underneath the text.

fields.name: fontFeatures
fields.description: A list of [FontFeature]s that affect how the font selects glyphs.

fields.name: fontVariations
fields.description: A list of [FontVariation]s that affect how a variable font is rendered.

fields.name: overflow
fields.description: How visual text overflow should be handled.

variants.description: Interpolate between two text styles for animated transitions.

structuredTypes.name: Radius
structuredTypes.description: A radius for either circular or elliptical shapes.

fields.name: x
fields.description: The radius value on the horizontal axis.

fields.name: y
fields.description: The radius value on the vertical axis.

variants.description: Constructs an elliptical radius with the given radii.
A radius with [x] and [y] values set to zero.

structuredTypes.name: BorderRadius
structuredTypes.description: An immutable set of radii for each corner of a rectangle.

fields.name: topLeft
fields.description: The top-left [Radius].

fields.name: topRight
fields.description: The top-right [Radius].

fields.name: bottomLeft
fields.description: The bottom-left [Radius].

fields.name: bottomRight
fields.description: The bottom-right [Radius].

variants.description: Creates a border radius with only the given non-zero values. The other corners will be right angles.
A border radius with all zero radii.

fields.name: begin
fields.description: The offset at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The offset at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond in the region before [begin] and after [end].

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: radius
fields.description: The radius of the gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane beyond the outer ring at [radius] pixels from the [center].

fields.name: focal
fields.description: The focal point of the gradient. If specified, the gradient will appear to be focused along the vector from [center] to focal.

fields.name: focalRadius
fields.description: The radius of the focal point of gradient, as a fraction of the shortest side of the paint box.

fields.name: center
fields.description: The center of the gradient, as an offset into the (-1.0, -1.0) x (1.0, 1.0) square describing the gradient which will be mapped onto the paint box.

fields.name: startAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 0.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: endAngle
fields.description: The angle in radians at which stop 1.0 of the gradient is placed.

fields.name: tileMode
fields.description: How this gradient should tile the plane in the region before [startAngle] and after [endAngle].

structuredTypes.name: BorderDirectional
structuredTypes.description: A border of a box, comprised of four sides, the lateral sides of which flip over based on the reading direction.

fields.name: start
fields.description: The start side of this border.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The end side of this border.

variants.description: Creates a [BorderDirectional] that represents the addition of the two given [BorderDirectional]s.

unions.name: Gradient
unions.description: A color gradient: linear, radial, or sweep.

unions.name: BoxBorder
unions.description: A box border: uniform or per-side Border, or text-direction-aware BorderDirectional.
